Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Sadhusanga.com - a way to get in touch with the peson behind it?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2008-10-24 · 6 answers
I tried to contact the devotees through their website, but no luck. Maybe someone knows who they are and if there is another way to get in touch with them?
user [2] · 2008-10-24
a three year old ad mentions a Dhruva Maharaja dasa:
http://www.chakra.org/announcements/LinksSep28_05.html
user [39] · 2008-10-24
Thank you, Prabhu. Does anyone know in which country he is based?
user [23] · 2008-10-24
I exchanged a few e-mails with Dhruva Maharaja Prabhu using this address a few weeks ago:

AudioBooks at sadhusanga.com
user [39] · 2008-10-25
Thank you, Pandu Prabhu. I wrote him at this e-mail a couple days ago but no reply so far. I guess I just have to practice my patience and wait...... Thanks though.
user [160] · 2008-10-26
See this ad from October 4, 2008 on Chakra
http://www.chakra.org/announcements/support_requests.html
user [39] · 2008-10-27
Its been resolved now, thank you :)
